content.speakerText: Can I renew my books online?

options.text: Yes, you can renew them at the front desk only.
Yep! Just log in to your account and click 'Renew'.
No, you need to call the library and wait for a staff member.
Only if you pay a fee first.

content.explanation: 正确答案提供了清晰的操作步骤（登录账户→点击续借），符合场景中‘必须包含具体操作步骤’的要求。干扰项1错误地限制了续借只能在前台办理；干扰项3夸大了流程复杂性；干扰项4添加了不存在的付费条件。

content.speakerText: What if the system says 'Cannot renew'?
content.speakerTextCn: 如果系统显示‘无法续借’怎么办？

options.text: The system is broken. Try again later.
Someone else requested it. You gotta return it.
You need to upgrade your library membership.
It means you've read too many books this month.

content.explanation: 正确答案准确解释了‘无法续借’的真正原因——他人预约（hold placed）。干扰项1错误归因于系统故障；干扰项3虚构了会员升级要求；干扰项4荒谬地将续借失败与阅读量挂钩。

content.speakerText: I tried to renew my book, but it didn't work. What should I do?
content.speakerTextCn: 我尝试续借图书但失败了，我该怎么办？

options.text: Check if there's a hold on the book. If so, you must return it by the due date.
Just email the librarian and ask for a special extension.
Delete your account and create a new one.

content.explanation: 正确答案结合了系统提示和用户责任，符合图书馆政策。干扰项2暗示非正式流程，不具普遍性；干扰项3和4完全脱离图书馆续借机制，属于误导性建议。

content.template: To renew your books, you need to ___ in to your library account and click 'Renew'.
content.hint: 这是登录账户的固定搭配
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配（log in to an account）

content.template: If you see 'Cannot renew', it means another patron has placed a ___ on the book.
content.hint: 图书馆术语，表示他人预约了这本书
content.knowledgePoint: 场景核心词汇（hold = 预约）

content.template: You can renew your books online ___ you haven't reached your renewal limit.
content.hint: 表示‘只要…就…’的条件表达

content.speakerText: Can I renew my books online?
expectedAnswers: Yes, just log in to your account and click Renew.
Sure! Go to the library website, sign in, and select the books you want to renew.
Absolutely, through the library portal — but make sure no one else has placed a hold on them.
evaluationCriteria: 是否明确说明了在线续借的操作路径（如登录、点击按钮）
是否使用了场景关键词（renew, account, library portal, hold）
表达是否自然流畅，符合日常口语习惯

content.speakerText: What if the system says 'Cannot renew'?
content.speakerTextCn: 如果系统显示‘无法续借’怎么办？
expectedAnswers: It means someone else has reserved the book — you'll need to return it by the due date.
Oh no, that’s because there’s a hold on it. You can’t renew, so return it on time to avoid fines.
The system blocks renewal if another patron has placed a hold. Unfortunately, you have to return it.
evaluationCriteria: 是否准确解释了‘无法续借’的真正原因（有人预约）
是否包含后果说明（需归还、可能罚款）
语言是否简洁清晰，避免冗余或错误信息

content.speakerText: I'm not sure if my book can be renewed. How can I check?
content.speakerTextCn: 我不确定我的书能不能续借，该怎么查？
expectedAnswers: Log in to your library account online — it will show you which books are eligible for renewal.
Check the due date on the app or website; if it says 'Renewable', you can do it.
Go to the library’s website, view your checked-out items, and look for a 'Renew' button next to each book.
evaluationCriteria: 是否提供了清晰的查询方法（登录账户、查看状态、查找按钮）
是否使用了场景相关词汇（renewable, due date, checked-out items）
回答是否结构完整、逻辑清晰，便于用户执行
